name: orvyq
description: ORVYQ canonical single-renderer cinematic documentary production system

scripts.orvyq:build-render-project: node scripts/remotion_build.mjs derive-configs --project-id=001-the-ai-race-no-one-can-afford-to-win && node scripts/remotion_build.mjs build-project --project-id=001-the-ai-race-no-one-can-afford-to-win
scripts.orvyq:audits: node scripts/orvyq_evidence_audit.mjs && node scripts/orvyq_evidence_asset_audit.mjs && node scripts/orvyq_semantic_visual_audit.mjs && node scripts/orvyq_pacing_audit.mjs && node scripts/orvyq_mobile_legibility_audit.mjs && node scripts/orvyq_music_cue_audit.mjs
scripts.orvyq:qa: npm run orvyq:audits && node scripts/orvyq_edit_plan_tests.mjs && node scripts/orvyq_license_audit.mjs && node scripts/orvyq_alignment_score.mjs && node scripts/orvyq_parity_check.mjs
